summary: GOAL.md refactoring contract fulfilled across all three pillars. Pillar 1 (complexity): 4 functions refactored — ActivityFeed.vue badgeLabel/badgeClass extraction (5-branch template ternary → 0), ExtratoPessoalService.ts acumularSaldoEmprestimo/acerto split (7→2 CC in dispatcher), validator.go scanCharClasses extraction (10→5 CC), bootstrap.go parseDBName extraction (10→5 CC). Pillar 2 (dead code): knip (0 dead exports), golangci-lint (0 warnings), eslint (86 no-explicit-any, all in test files — zero dead code). Pillar 3 (densification): ws_hub.go is intentional boundary, repository interfaces are architectural contracts, no unnecessary wrappers found. Zones of exclusion respected (container.ts, apiSchemas.ts, ui/, middleware/, migrations/).
